zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bois I於1329年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾康寧斯比時，他的父親William de Bois34歲，母親Mrs Willam de Bois12歲。他於大約1355年與Eustace Sandeby在英國英格蘭戴文哈爾波頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年在英國越可爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bois I于1329年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾康寧斯比时，他的父亲William de Bois34岁，母亲Mrs Willam de Bois12岁。他于大约1355年与Eustace Sandeby在英国英格兰戴文哈爾波頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年在英国越可爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Dubois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Pierre, Fernand, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Michel, Alain, Luc.

French, Walloon, and English (of French Huguenot origin): topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ), or a habitational name for someone from any of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia) named Le Bois. This is the most frequent surname in Wallonia. It is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium, the Netherlands, Germany, and Haiti. In both England and North America it is sometimes translated into English as Wood . Compare Deboe , Debois , Deboy , Duboise , and Dubose .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Du Bois) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America. One of the several Huguenot ancestors bearing this name was Chrétien Du Bois from Flanders, whose son, Louis Du Bois (born 1626 in Lille, France, died 1696 in Kingston, NY), was among the Huguenots who founded the town of New Paltz, NY 1675–78.

variants.name: Boisvert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Andre, Donat, Lucien, Jacques, Gaston, Normand, Pierre, Gilles, Herve, Adrien.
French:
topographic name for someone who lived in a dense forest or perhaps a copse of evergreens, from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + vert, verd ‘green’.

variants.name: Boisclair
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Marcel, Aldege, Alphonse, Arsene, Edmour, Emile, Leopaul, Prudent, Rejean, Remi, Yves.

French: topographic name from Old French bois ‘wood’ (see Bois ) + clair ‘clear, light’, or a habitational name from (Le) Bois Clair, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is virtually non-existing in France.

variants.name: Boies
meanings: Altered form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Baskerville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Debois
meanings: Altered form of French   Dubois  , a cognate of 1 above.
French: topographic name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone living or working in a wood (see Bois ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bois I was born in 1329, in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Bois, was 34 and his mother, Mrs Willam de Bois, was 12. He married Eustace Sandeby about 1355, in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1388, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bois I est né en 1329, à Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Bois, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs Willam de Bois, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Eustace Sandeby environ 1355, à Halberton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1388, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bois I 1329 in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Bois 34 und seine Mutter Mrs Willam de Bois 12. Er hat um 1355 in Halberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Eustace Sandeby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1388 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bois I è nato il nel 1329 nel Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Bois, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Willam de Bois, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Eustace Sandeby circa 1355, nel Halberton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1388, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bois Iが1329年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコニングスビーで生まれた時，父William de Boisは34歳，母Mrs Willam de Boisは12歳であった。約1355年にイギリスイギリスデボンハルバートンでEustace Sandebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bois I(이)가 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 코닝스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Bois(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Willam de Bois(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 할버턴에서 Eustace Sandeby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 영국 요르크실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bois I nasceu em 1329, em Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Bois, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Willam de Bois, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Eustace Sandeby aproximadamente 1355, em Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1388, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bois I родился в 1329 г. в местности конингсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Bois было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Willam de Bois, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Eustace Sandeby около 1355 г. в местности хэлбиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1388 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bois I nació en 1329, en Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Bois, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Mrs Willam de Bois, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Eustace Sandeby aproximadamente 1355, en Halberton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1388, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
